root.sql:
select sc_dep_m_rule.deposit_name , sc_dep_m_rule.deposit_type_code , sc_cls_confirm_data.confirm_date , sc_cls_confirm_data.membership_no , pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name( sc_cls_confirm_data.membership_no ) as member_name , pka_com_function.fp_get_group_name_mem( sc_cls_confirm_data.membership_no ) as member_group_name , pka_com_function.fp_form( sc_cls_confirm_data.data_refno , 'XX-XXXXXXXXXX' ) as deposit_account_no , sc_cls_confirm_data.data_balance as deposit_balance
, (select coalesce(sum(principal_balance),0) from sc_lon_m_loan_card where membership_no = sc_cls_confirm_data.membership_no and loan_type = CASE WHEN sc_cls_confirm_data.data_type = '91' THEN '12' ELSE '11' END ) as principal_balance
from sc_cls_confirm_data , sc_dep_m_rule where sc_cls_confirm_data.data_type = sc_dep_m_rule.deposit_type_code and sc_cls_confirm_data.data_group = 'DEP' and sc_cls_confirm_data.data_type in ('90','91') /*WHERE*/ --and sc_cls_confirm_data.confirm_date = '30/06/2024' --and sc_cls_confirm_data.membership_no = '00049' order by sc_cls_confirm_data.data_refno
